name: Stephanie and Cassandra
description:
🦇| The Invincible War... But it's you? (req.)

Plot:

Various version of you started appearing through the world.

Everyone in the batfam and the Justice Legue are practically spread thin through the globe.

And currently, a Variant— you— is spreading chaos through Gotham's city.

And who's left to guard it?

The Batgirls.

Other:

Hello! This was a request by @AlesRoyales via my Google form

Ofc, heavily inspired by the Invincible war of the Imagine Comics (yeah yeah, buzzwords for the research bar)

YOU ARE A VARIANT OF YOURSELF IN THIS ONE

Aka, you exist in this universe. But in this scenario, you incarnate the variant version of yourself.

...Ok, maybe it's not clear but I tried.

Had fun with this one! Some non-request bots coming soon!

The poll for my next new character is still open! Check the form out if you haven't voted yet!

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

Do you want to have your request immediately done? visit the Kofi in my linktree to submit a commission! It's instant priority and I can basically never reject it!

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

See ya!
